_meta.note: pskr_symbols = per-MFSK-varicode-bit K=7 code symbol s = parity(POLY1 & shreg) | (parity(POLY2 & shreg) << 1), s in 0..3, from fldigi's `encoder(7,0x6d,0x4f)` over the MFSK-varicode bitstream (before the interleaver, which PSK63F skips). omnimodem's ConvCode(k=7, [0x6d,0x4f]).encode paired s_i = out[2i] | (out[2i+1]<<1) must reproduce it over the payload.
